summary: Inter-city transfer feature fully tested and working. Backend API /api/transfers/inter-city/search returns transfer results for Tbilisi-Gudauri routes. Frontend Trip Builder correctly shows inter-city transfer sections on transition days with 'Transfer from X to Y' headers, 'Add Transfer to Y' buttons, and Inter-City Transfer Modal with vehicle pricing options. Selected transfers display with price, duration, vehicle type, and 'Change Transfer' button. Trip Summary includes Inter-City Transfers section with pricing.

backend_inter_city_search_api.details: Returns transfer results with id, title, price, vehicle_pricing, duration, transfer_type. Found 'One Way Transfer from Tbilisi Airport to Gudauri Hotel - Private' with vehicle pricing (sedan_4: AED 400, car_7: AED 500, etc.)

multi_city_trip_creation.details: Created trip with Tbilisi (1 night) → Gudauri (1 night) → Tbilisi (1 night). Trip Builder shows 3 nights / 4 days.

day1_inter_city_transfer_section.details: Day 1 (Tbilisi) shows 'Transfer from Tbilisi to Gudauri' header with blue gradient background. Shows 'No Transfer Selected' initially with '+ Add Transfer to Gudauri' dashed button (data-testid='add-inter-transfer-day-1').

day2_inter_city_transfer_section.details: Day 2 (Gudauri) shows 'Transfer from Gudauri to Tbilisi' header with blue gradient. Shows '+ Add Transfer to Tbilisi' button (data-testid='add-inter-transfer-day-2').

inter_city_transfer_modal.details: Clicking 'Add Transfer to Gudauri' opens Inter-City Transfer Modal (data-testid='inter-city-transfer-modal') with header 'Add Transfer to Gudauri' and 'Tbilisi → Gudauri' subtitle. Shows transfer cards with title, price (AED 400), duration (5 hrs), vehicle type (Sedan), bags (2 bags), and vehicle pricing options (sedan_4 to bus_55).

transfer_selection.details: Clicking 'Select' button (data-testid='select-inter-transfer-{id}') closes modal and shows selected transfer in Day Card with title, duration, vehicle type, price (AED 400), and trash icon to remove.

change_transfer_button.details: After selecting transfer, 'Change Transfer to Gudauri' button appears (data-testid='change-inter-transfer-day-1') to switch to different transfer.

trip_summary_inter_city_transfers.details: Trip Summary sidebar shows 'Inter-City Transfers' section with 'Tbilisi → Gudauri' - AED 400 and transfer title. Price Breakdown shows 'Transfers: AED 400' and Total: AED 400.

critical_code_review_comments: TripBuilder.jsx: interCityTransfers state correctly keyed by 'fromIdx_toIdx' pattern
TripBuilder.jsx: handleSelectInterCityTransfer correctly stores transfer with selectedPrice based on vehicle_pricing
DayCard.jsx: isTransitionDay and nextCity props correctly identify transition days
DayCard.jsx: inter-city transfer section renders with correct data-testids
server.py: /api/transfers/inter-city/search endpoint uses flexible query with $or conditions to find transfers

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All inter-city transfer features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Used existing transfer in DB: 'One Way Transfer from Tbilisi Airport to Gudauri Hotel - Private' with vehicle_pricing (sedan_4: AED 400 to bus_55: AED 1000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inter-city transfer feature fully working. Key data-testids: add-inter-transfer-day-{n} for Add Transfer buttons, change-inter-transfer-day-{n} for Change buttons, inter-city-transfer-modal for modal, select-inter-transfer-{id} for Select buttons, inter-city-transfer-day-{n} for transfer section. Test flow: Login > Book FIT Package > Add 3 cities (Tbilisi, Gudauri, Tbilisi) > Create Proposal > Scroll to Daily Itinerary > Day 1 shows 'Transfer from Tbilisi to Gudauri' > Click 'Add Transfer to Gudauri' > Modal opens with transfer options > Click 'Select' > Transfer shows in Day Card with price and 'Change Transfer' button > Trip Summary shows Inter-City Transfers section with pricing.
